summary: The video shows a snowy rural road with two vehicles traveling in opposite directions. A white van overtakes the ego-vehicle from behind, passing closely while both vehicles navigate the snowy terrain.

events_timeline.event: A white van overtakes the ego-vehicle from behind, passing closely while both vehicles navigate the snowy terrain.

uncertainties: The exact speed of the van is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of severe collision or loss of control.
